testcase.name: test_version
testcase.failure:
def test_version(): > result = CliRunner().invoke(tmx, ["--version"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
test/test_cli.py:11: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/typer/testing.py:21: in invoke use_cli = _get_command(app) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
typer_instance = <function tmx at 0x105ef51c0>
def get_command(typer_instance: Typer) -> click.Command: > if typer_instance._add_completion: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'function' object has no attribute '_add_completion'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/typer/main.py:1172: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_bounds
testcase.failure:
def test_bounds(): zoom, row, col = 12, 0, 0 for grid in ["geodetic", "mercator"]: > _run_bbox_bounds(zoom, row, col, "bounds", grid=grid)

testcase.name: test_tile
testcase.failure:
def test_tile(): point = [10, 20] zoom = 5 for grid in ["geodetic", "mercator"]: > _run_tile(zoom, point, grid=grid)

testcase.failure:
